news.title: Jeff Bezos says bottom half of earners should pay zero in income taxes
news.summary: Jeff Bezos calls for zero federal income taxes on the bottom half of earners. Amazon Executive Chairman Jeff Bezos is chairman of Amazon's parent company, Amazon.

news.title: U.S. crude oil falls below $100 per barrel after Trump says Iran talks in final stages
news.summary: The administration is in the "final stages" of negotiations with Iran, President Trump says. The White House says the talks are in their final stages.

news.title: Wendy's taps former Potbelly CEO to lead struggling burger chain
news.summary: Nelson Peltz's Trian Fund Management is seeking funding to take Wendy's private, according to a Financial Times report. The company is owned by Wendy's parent company, Wendy's Co.

news.title: Jan. 6 police officers sue Trump to block $1.8B 'lawfare' fund
news.summary: The Department of Justice agreed to create the fund to settle a $10 billion lawsuit by President Trump over the leak of his tax records by an IRS employee.

news.title: Trump's face doesn't belong on U.S. passport, senators tell Rubio
news.summary: The State Department announced a special edition U.S. passport that will feature President Donald Trump's likeness. The passport will be released in time for the holiday season.

news.title: Here’s why Target’s turnaround may not be as smooth as the latest results imply
news.summary: Target's turnaround efforts include everything from redesigned shopping carts to a “concierge’ service for baby products. But the retailer’s optimism about those plans has run up against skepticism from investors.

news.title: Want to live a more meaningful life? Write your own obituary.
news.summary: You add meaning and intentionality to your days. By summarizing the life you’ve lived so far and theLife you want to have from now on.

news.title: Global oil prices drop below $106 a barrel on hopes that U.S.-Iran war will soon end
news.summary: Oil futures extend declines on reports that U.S. and Iran will hold talks in Pakistan. News raises hopes for a resolution to the months-long stalemate in the Middle East.

news.title: ‘He didn’t really pay attention’: I told my friend he left millions on the table in retirement. Did I do the right thing?
news.summary: “He lived very frugally and maxed out his 401(k)s,” his daughter says. “He’s a great guy. He was a great dad.”

news.title: Micron’s stock gets a boost. Are Samsung’s problems helping?
news.summary: A looming strike by Samsung workers could further tighten memory supply and boost prices, analysts said. Samsung workers are scheduled to go on strike on Thursday.
